Cgu.title: Terms of use — Zen Coach
Cgu.intro: These terms of use (“Terms”) govern access to and use of the Zen Coach mobile application (the “App”), published by Hugo Varloud. By installing or using the App, you accept these Terms in full.
Cgu.serviceBody: Zen Coach provides well-being content (guided breathing exercises, quotes, related features) as gentle support. The App may offer free options and paid options (subscriptions or in-app purchases depending on the platform). Features may evolve; the description shown on the app stores (App Store, Google Play) at the time you download applies.
Cgu.useBody: You agree to use the App fairly and in compliance with applicable law and these Terms. Misuse (attempts to circumvent technical measures, harm security or third-party rights, etc.) may result in suspension of access to the relevant services.
Cgu.ipBody: Elements of the App (text, graphics, brand, structure, code, etc.) are protected. Unless stated otherwise, no reproduction or commercial use is permitted without the publisher’s prior written consent.
Cgu.liabilityBody: The App does not replace medical, psychological, or therapeutic advice. If you are in distress or have concerning symptoms, consult a healthcare professional. To the extent permitted by law, the publisher is not liable for improper use or indirect damage.
Cgu.dataBodyBefore: Processing related to the App is described in the
Cgu.changesBody: These Terms may be updated; the last update date may be shown on this page. Continued use of the App means you accept the Terms in force.
Cgu.lawBody: Unless mandatory rules provide otherwise, these Terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, French courts may have jurisdiction.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy — Zen Coach
Privacy.intro: This policy explains how the Zen Coach mobile app (guided breathing, quotes, notifications, freemium subscription) handles information in connection with your use. It aims to be transparent with respect to Google Play developer requirements on user data.
Privacy.publisherLine1: The publisher of the Zen Coach app is
Privacy.publisherLine3: For any questions about this policy or your data, use the details in the “Contact and exercising your rights” section below.
Privacy.dataProcessedIntro: Zen Coach does not require you to create an account on our servers to use core features. The main processing is as follows:
Privacy.dataProcessed_li1_label: Data stored locally on the device
Privacy.dataProcessed_li1_rest: : preferences (e.g. language, app settings), cached content, and information related to premium status or purchases as kept by the system or local app storage (e.g. purchase identifiers or purchase state on the device). This data stays on your phone unless the app clearly states otherwise.
Privacy.dataProcessed_li2_rest: : payments and subscription management go through Google Play. Google processes data needed for payment and billing under its own rules (see “Purchases via Google Play”).
Privacy.dataProcessed_li3_rest: : if you enable notifications, the Android system may process technical metadata related to sending reminders or messages (depending on your Android version and settings).
Privacy.dataProcessed_footer: We do not sell your personal data to third parties under this policy.
Privacy.healthBody1: Zen Coach offers well-being content (including guided breathing, quotes). The app does not collect health data from physiological sensors (e.g. heart rate, oxygenation) and does not record health data via APIs such as Health Connect or equivalent to build a health record on our systems.
Privacy.healthBody2: Breathing exercises and related content are processed locally on the device. We do not receive physiological measurements from sensors through the app, and no such data is sent to servers we operate to build a health record. Core use described here does not require a user account on our servers; processing related to purchases via Google Play is described under “Purchases via Google Play”.
Privacy.permissionsIntro: Depending on features and Android version, Zen Coach may request in particular:
Privacy.permissions_li3: Storage / media access to save a generated image to the device gallery when that feature is offered.
Privacy.permissions_footer: You can revoke these permissions in your Android device settings; some features may then be unavailable.
Privacy.retentionBody1: Data stored locally by the app remains there while the app is installed and until you clear it via system or app settings.
Privacy.retentionBody2: Uninstalling: removing Zen Coach from your device generally deletes app data in the app’s private space, subject to Android behaviour and any backups managed by Google or by you.
Privacy.retentionBody3: Information about purchases managed by Google Play may be retained by Google under its own rules, independently of uninstalling the app.
Privacy.deletionIntro: To clear local app data without uninstalling immediately, you can use the usual path on Android (labels may vary by version):
Privacy.deletionPath: Settings → Apps → Zen Coach → Storage → Clear data
Privacy.deletionBody1: You can also uninstall the app to remove data associated with it on the device (subject to the points above regarding backups and Google Play).
Privacy.deletionBody2_before: For requests about your data or exercising your rights (access, rectification, erasure where applicable, etc.), write to
Privacy.deletionBody2_after: We aim to respond within a reasonable time, in principle within 30 business days, unless the law requires otherwise or the request is unusually complex.
Privacy.googlePlayIntro: Processing of payments, subscriptions, and related billing information for purchases on Google Play is subject to Google’s terms and privacy policy, in addition to this policy. You may consult in particular:
Privacy.updatesBody: We may update this policy to reflect changes to the app or legal requirements. The last update date is at the bottom of the page; please review it periodically when you use Zen Coach.
Privacy.contactBefore: Questions about this policy or Zen Coach:
